_comment_top: R6 task 101 (D-H-01, FR-17) — seed row for the DateExtractorHandler typed handler.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'DateExtractorHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Pure deterministic date normalization + relative-date resolution. Parses ISO 8601, US/EU short formats, named months, quarter notation, and relative phrases ('next quarter', 'tomorrow', 'in 30 days') into canonical ISO 8601 dates. NO LLM call.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-17 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: DateExtractorHandler Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of DateExtractorHandler. The 'text' field carries the input to scan for date references.

text.description: Free-text input to scan for date references. The handler extracts every recognizable date and returns normalized ISO 8601 output. NEVER pre-processed by the LLM — this is the literal text to scan.

sprk_configuration._comment: Default configuration. Per-invocation playbook config may override referenceDate / locale / confidenceThreshold per row.

_comment_configuration: referenceDate is intentionally OMITTED — defaults to DateTimeOffset.UtcNow at execution. locale = US (MM/DD/YYYY); set 'EU' for DD/MM/YYYY disambiguation. confidenceThreshold = 0.0 returns all matches; raise to 0.9+ to filter ambiguous/inferred-year cases.
